results.rendered_html: !√mukharay (wie eben), ˚yati ertönen machen: svarge kiṃ vaiṣa cakraṃ mukharayati diśāṃ dundubhīnāṃ ninādaḥ  NĀGĀN. 54,9 . mukharaya maṇirasanāguṇamanuguṇakaṇṭhaninādam  GĪT. 12,7 . mukharitarasana 7,16 . mukharitamaṇimañjīra 11,3 . saṃcaradadharasudhāmadhuradhvanimukharitamohanavaṃśa 2,2 . ākarṇya tanmukharitākhiladigvibhāgam  KATHĀS. 16,121 . tasminmahanmukharitā madhubhiccaritrapīyūṣaśeṣasaritaḥ paritaḥ sravanti  BHĀG. P. 4,29,40 . mukharitamāśīrmaṅgalairaṅganānām — rājadhāma  RĀJA-TAR. 5,482 .  MĀLATĪM. 1,7 .  PAÑCAR. 3,5,2 .
